headline: Peter Thiel’s family office revealed as tenant signing pricey lease at 830 Brickell
summary: Peter Thiel and 830 Brickell (Getty, 830 Brickell) Peter Thiel’s family office leased space at OKO Group and Cain International’s 830 Brickell tower in a record deal for Miami-Dade County. The deal is for $250 per square foot for nearly 18,200 square feet of space on the 44th floor of the building, with Thiel’s family office taking over part of the space previously leased by the now collapsed Brazilian bank Banco Master, according to Bloomberg, which cited an anonymous source familiar with the m

headline: How The PayPal Holdings (PYPL) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Expectations And Valuation
summary: PayPal Holdings is under fresh scrutiny after an updated valuation model set fair value at US$51.35, down from US$53.00. This shift aligns with a Street narrative that is split between analysts who still see potential in the stock and others who are more cautious as they reassess growth and corporate structure questions. As you read on, you will see how these moving pieces fit together and what to watch as the PayPal story continues to evolve. Wall Street's queuing for one rocket. While...
